title: Environment Considerations for SQLite
text: Environment Considerations for SQLite It is strongly recommended that you have the SQLite database on a local drive. SQLite has limited support for concurrent access. For more information, see Locking Considerations for SQLite . The SQLite documentation recommends: Note: If you have many client programs accessing a common database over a network, you should consider using a client/server database engine instead of SQLite. Consult the SQLite documentation for more information. ( https://www.sqlite.org/whentouse.html ) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
